title: Battalion v1.2.34
content:
Battalion received a small tone pass on the public dashboard. This update keeps the rotating quote system intact while removing the passive optimistic endings that had been appended to each line.

What changed:

  • Stripped the hopeful trailing add-ons from all 100 public quotes so the dashboard voice stays fully introspective and self-deprecating.
  • Kept the quote rotation system and refresh behavior from the previous dashboard update intact.
  • Rebuilt the client successfully after the quote-file cleanup and synced the version trail to the shared actions log.
